sections.paragraph:
Original: מפת מופת

Transliteration: môphêth môphêth

Phonetic: mo-faith'

BDB Definition:

  1. wonder, sign, miracle, portent
    1. wonder (as a special display of God's power)
    2. sign, token (of future event)

Origin: from H3302 in the sense of conspicuousness

TWOT entry: 152a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
